diagrams.title: CI/CD Pipeline Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the stages from code commit to production deployment
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete automated deployment workflow and how each stage contributes to reliable releases

diagrams.title: Blue-Green Deployment
diagrams.description: Two parallel production environments switching traffic
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how zero-downtime deployment works and instant rollback capability

diagrams.title: Canary Deployment
diagrams.description: Gradual rollout from subset to full user base
diagrams.purpose: Understanding risk mitigation through gradual feature exposure and monitoring

diagrams.title: Rolling Deployment
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how updates happen incrementally to maintain availability
